targets.query: SELECT mean("avg_sinr") AS "avg_sinr", mean("min_sinr") AS "min_sinr", mean("max_sinr") AS "max_sinr" FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("tx_success_rate") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT sum("harq_failure") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("avg_rsrp") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("total_bytes") FROM "mac_bsr_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_cqi") FROM "mac_uci_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT sum("sr_detected") FROM "mac_uci_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("avg_mcs"), mean("min_mcs") AS "min_mcs", mean("max_mcs") AS "max_mcs" FROM "mac_harq_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT sum("retx_count") FROM "mac_harq_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("avg_mcs") AS "DL MCS" FROM "fapi_dl_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_mcs") AS "UL MCS" FROM "fapi_ul_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_prb") AS "DL PRBs" FROM "fapi_dl_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_prb") AS "UL PRBs" FROM "fapi_ul_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_tbs") AS "DL TBS" FROM "fapi_dl_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("avg_tbs") AS "UL TBS" FROM "fapi_ul_config" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("snr_max") AS "snr_max", mean("snr_min") AS "snr_min" FROM "fapi_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("ta_max") AS "TA Max", mean("ta_min") AS "TA Min" FROM "fapi_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("pdu_tx_bytes") AS "PDU TX", mean("sdu_new_bytes") AS "SDU New" FROM "rlc_dl_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("pdu_rx_bytes") AS "PDU RX", mean("sdu_delivered_bytes") AS "SDU Delivered" FROM "rlc_ul_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT sum("am_retx_count") FROM "rlc_dl_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(0)
SELECT mean("avg_sdu_latency") / 1000 AS "SDU Delivery Latency" FROM "rlc_ul_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

options.noDataMessage: No DL PDCP data yet (only generated during DL traffic or at setup)

targets.query: SELECT mean("data_tx_bytes") AS "Data TX", mean("data_retx_bytes") AS "Retx" FROM "pdcp_dl_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("data_rx_bytes") AS "Data RX", mean("sdu_delivered_bytes") AS "SDU Delivered" FROM "pdcp_ul_stats" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT "event" FROM "rrc_events" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "event_type"
SELECT "event" FROM "ngap_events" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "event_type", "procedure"
SELECT mean("p50") FROM "jbpf_perf" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "hook" fill(none)

panels.title: jBPF Hook Latency — p50 Over Time

targets.query: SELECT mean("p99") FROM "jbpf_perf" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "hook" fill(none)

panels.title: jBPF Hook Latency — p99 Over Time

targets.query: SELECT last("invocations") FROM "jbpf_perf" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "hook" fill(none)
SELECT last("avg_sinr") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("tx_success_rate") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("harq_failure") FROM "mac_crc_stats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("avg_cqi") FROM "mac_uci_stats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("p50") FROM "jbpf_perf" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none) LIMIT 1
SELECT last("total_bytes") FROM "mac_bsr_stats" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("bitrate_mbps") AS "UL Mbps" FROM "ue_ul_throughput" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(none)
SELECT mean("bitrate_mbps") AS "DL Mbps" FROM "ue_dl_throughput" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(none)
SELECT mean("rtt_ms") AS "RTT ms" FROM "ue_rtt" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(none)
SELECT mean("jitter_ms") AS "Jitter ms" FROM "ue_dl_throughput" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(none)
SELECT mean("loss_pct") AS "Loss %" FROM "ue_dl_throughput" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1s) fill(none)

panels.title: Custom SINR Analytics — Variance & Sliding Window
SINR: Window Mean vs Sliding Average

targets.query: SELECT mean("avg_sinr") AS "avg_sinr", mean("sinr_sliding_avg") AS "sinr_sliding_avg", mean("min_sinr") AS "min_sinr", mean("max_sinr") AS "max_sinr" FROM "mac_crc_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT mean("sinr_variance") AS "sinr_variance" FROM "mac_crc_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

panels.title: TX Success Rate & Sliding Window Fill

targets.query: SELECT mean("tx_success_rate") AS "tx_success_rate", mean("sinr_sliding_cnt") AS "sinr_sliding_cnt" FROM "mac_crc_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("sinr_variance") FROM "mac_crc_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("sinr_sliding_avg") FROM "mac_crc_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter

panels.title: Custom Analytics — BSR & UL MCS Sliding Window

targets.query: SELECT mean("bsr_sliding_avg_kb") AS "bsr_sliding_avg_kb", mean("avg_bytes") AS "avg_bytes" FROM "mac_bsr_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

panels.title: UL MCS: Sliding Window Average + Variance

targets.query: SELECT mean("avg_mcs") AS "avg_mcs", mean("mcs_sliding_avg") AS "mcs_sliding_avg", mean("mcs_variance") AS "mcs_variance" FROM "mac_ul_harq_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)
SELECT last("bsr_sliding_avg_kb") FROM "mac_bsr_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("mcs_sliding_avg") FROM "mac_ul_harq_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("mcs_variance") FROM "mac_ul_harq_stats_custom" WHERE $timeFilter
